# urmortgage.online — Global Mortgage Calculator

> Free mortgage repayment calculator supporting 25 countries, 250+ lenders, and central bank rate tracking.

## About
urmortgage.online is a free, single-page mortgage repayment calculator
that helps home buyers and property investors model real-world loan
scenarios. It covers 25 countries across Asia-Pacific, North America,
Europe, Middle East, Latin America, and Africa with 250+ lenders and
their current margins. Built as a lightweight static site with no
login required.

## Key Features
- Country and lender selection with auto-calculated interest rates
- Central bank rate history (400+ data points)
- Extra repayments: recurring, annual, and one-time lump sums
- Offset account modelling with time-windowed periods
- Mid-loan schedule changes (repayment type, frequency, rate type)
- Full amortisation schedule with month-by-month breakdown
- Balance chart comparing with vs without extra repayments
- CSV and PDF export
- Save and load configurations across sessions
- Indian number system support (Lakh/Crore)

## Countries Supported
Australia, New Zealand, Japan, Singapore, Hong Kong, South Korea,
India, Malaysia, United States, Canada, United Kingdom, Germany,
France, Netherlands, Spain, Italy, Sweden, Norway, Denmark,
Switzerland, Ireland, Belgium, Portugal, UAE, Brazil, South Africa

## Key Facts
- Completely free, no registration required
- Static single-page HTML application
- No personal data collected or stored server-side
- Interest rates and lender margins are approximate and updated periodically
- Not financial advice — users should consult licensed advisors

## Contact
- Website: https://urmortgage.online
